name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

<!--
For open-ended ideas or "how would you approach X" questions, please
use Discussions (https://github.com/keel-trade/keel-trade/discussions)
instead. This template is for concrete feature requests.

⚠️  Do NOT paste wallet keys, private strategies, or PII.
-->

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the use case in 2-4 sentences. What are you trying to
     do, and what's blocking it today? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would the ideal behavior look like? CLI flag? New MCP tool?
     API response shape? UI affordance? -->

## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- Other ways you could solve this — including workarounds you're
     using today. -->

## Who benefits

<!-- Just you? A specific kind of trader / agent setup? Most users? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Optional: relevant prior art, links to similar tools, etc. -->
